overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked, neon-lit Night City at night. The player navigates through urban industrial zones, highways, and tunnels with a futuristic vehicle HUD displaying speed and system diagnostics while heavy rain creates reflective surfaces on the roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban industrial street with overhead pass

events.description: entering covered area beneath concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked neon-lit streets, approaching and entering an overpass area

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
pink and cyan neon building signs glowing in the rain
massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road
tall industrial street lighting with orange glow
yellow and black striped concrete road barriers

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked urban industrial street at night, illuminated by neon signs and digital billboards. The vehicle approaches and enters a covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass, with street lamps and road barriers visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial container yard with tight passages

events.description: slowing down to navigate tight turns between shipping containers
HUD notification 'West Wind Estate' appears in lower left corner

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow industrial passages between shipping containers and concrete barriers, reducing speed for tight corners

entered.detail: large rusted metal shipping container with industrial markings
chain-link metal security gate blocking side passage
tall chain-link fence with barbed wire topping
bright floodlight on metal pole illuminating the yard

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a confined industrial container yard with metal shipping containers and chain-link fences. The vehicle slows to maneuver through tight passages as the 'West Wind Estate' notification appears on the HUD, transitioning from the open street into a sheltered industrial zone.

events.description: accelerating to high speed on open highway, reaching 90+ km/h

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speeds on the open highway, passing under overhead lights with minimal steering input

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail with reflective strips
tall overhead street lighting along the highway
highway directional sign with illuminated text
silhouettes of distant skyscrapers against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Accelerating onto a wide-open multi-lane highway with metal guardrails and overhead lighting. The vehicle reaches high speeds as rain continues to fall, with distant city buildings visible through the hazy neon-lit atmosphere.

events.description: slowing down while navigating through dense container stacks

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate through densely packed shipping containers and industrial obstacles

entered.detail: large industrial crane for moving shipping containers
corrugated metal industrial shed with rusted roof
tall concrete security wall with graffiti
bright floodlight illuminating the container stacks

segments.scene_description: Slowing down while navigating through a dense industrial container yard with stacked shipping containers, cranes, and concrete walls. The area is dimly lit by industrial floodlights as the vehicle maneuvers between metal sheds and container stacks.

events.description: entering dark tunnel with 'Biotechnica Flats' notification appearing on HUD
transitioning from natural dark to artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed tunnel with artificial overhead lighting, maintaining moderate speed

entered.detail: rough concrete tunnel wall with water stains
linear overhead fluorescent lighting along tunnel ceiling
thick concrete support pillar with warning stripes
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: Entering a dark concrete tunnel marked by the 'Biotechnica Flats' HUD notification. The environment transitions to fully enclosed artificial lighting with rough concrete walls, support pillars, and graffiti-covered surfaces as the vehicle continues through the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked urban industrial district that transitions from open, neon-lit streets into a confined shipping yard. It begins by cruising along a wet road illuminated by digital billboards and neon signs, moving steadily toward the shadow of a massive concrete overpass. As the vehicle passes beneath the overpass, the open city atmosphere shifts into a sheltered industrial zone characterized by street lamps and road barriers. The scene then narrows as the camera maneuvers through a tight container yard filled with metal shipping containers and chain-link fences, while a West Wind Estate notification appears on the HUD.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a wide-open neon highway into a claustrophobic industrial zone and finally into a dark underground tunnel. It begins by accelerating along a multi-lane highway flanked by metal guardrails, where distant city buildings blur through a hazy, rain-soaked atmosphere. As the vehicle slows, the open road gives way to a dense industrial container yard, shifting the environment to a dimly lit maze of stacked shipping containers, cranes, and concrete walls. The scene then narrows further as the vehicle enters a dark concrete tunnel marked by a Biotechnica Flats notification, replacing the outdoor rain with artificial lighting and graffiti-covered support pillars.
